positive: A symmetrical, repeating pattern featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and celestial elements, such as crescent moons, shooting stars, and glowing nebulae. The style should be highly detailed, psychedelic pop art mixed with engraved line work, using strong contrast between deep indigo blues, vibrant neon magenta, electric teal, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be tileable and perfect for a central apparel print, featuring clean, sharp silhouettes and geometric balance. High saturation, digital illustration, vector art quality, studio lighting, centered composition, graphic design.
